conditional_closure.does_not_claim: The hypothesis is not proved in this packet.
conditional_closure.hypothesis: For every primitive finite prefix target z, after first-match deletion, |G_gen_support(z)| + |D_full_rank_prim(z)| <= t*p

paid_image_cells.formula: R <= t row indices times p generated slopes

mu1_ceiling_for_free_coeff_filtration.meaning: If max_z max_alpha |Fib_{w+1}(z||alpha)| <= mu1_ceiling, then max |Fib_w(z)| <= p*mu1_ceiling <= target_floor.

fixed_core_clique.name: fixed_core_top_seam_clique_packing
proof_sketch: Top-seam means e = |S\T| = |T\S| = w+1 and S∩T = C with |C|=j-e.
Side sets U=S\C and V=T\C are disjoint by construction of C=S∩T.
Any two members of a same-core clique give side sets both disjoint from C and pairwise disjoint from each other (their supports meet exactly at C).
Pack e-sets into a ground set of size n-|C|.
fixed_core_clique.statement: For a fixed common core C of size j-(w+1), any family of top-seam mates sharing exactly that core has pairwise disjoint side sets of size e=w+1, hence size <= floor((n-|C|)/(w+1)).

free_coeff_filtration.atom_criterion: If max |Fib_{w+1}| <= floor(target_floor / p) = 128988645, the w-depth max fiber is <= target_floor and the additive residual split is not even needed.
free_coeff_filtration.name: free_coefficient_filtration
proof_sketch: The first w monic coefficients are the fiber label z.
The next monic coefficient a_{w+1} takes values in a set of size <= p.
Fixing (z, a_{w+1}) is exactly the depth-(w+1) prefix fiber.
free_coeff_filtration.self_similarity: The multiplier kappa = target/avg is invariant under this depth shift: avg_{w+1}=avg_w/p and target_{w+1}=target_w/p, so kappa is unchanged. Depth reduction alone does not ease the finite kappa demand.
free_coeff_filtration.statement: Write Lambda_S = X^j + z_1 X^{j-1}+...+z_w X^{j-w} + a_{w+1} X^{j-w-1}+.... For fixed z=(z_1..z_w), partition Fib_w(z) by a_{w+1} in F_p. Each block is a fiber of the depth-(w+1) prefix map. Hence |Fib_w(z)| <= p * max_alpha |Fib_{w+1}(z||alpha)|.

kappa_self_similarity.name: kappa_depth_self_similarity
kappa_self_similarity.statement: For the full-fiber form of the atom, the admissible multiplier kappa = floor(B_rem * p^w / C(n,j)) is unchanged when the prefix depth increases by 1 and the target/average are both divided by p.

remaining.deployed_target: For every primitive finite prefix target z at KB-MCA a=1116048, after first-match deletion of generated_field / quotient_planted / sparse_pade_hankel / m1_window_shadow / rank_drop_pivot / bc_chart / sp_shift_pair / extension_slope, |G_gen_support(z)| + |D_full_rank_prim(z)| <= t*p = 143763024447376.

equivalent_forms.form: Residual supports inject (controlled mult <=1 after first-match) into a label space of size <= t*p, e.g. {0..t-1} x F_p or marked-incidence keys.

Every large signed folding defect satisfying the odd prefix equations is quotient-descended, sparse/Pade-Hankel, M1/window-shadow, rank-drop with printed pivot cost, generated-field support-paid, or lies in a primitive full-rank defect stratum of mass <= t*p.
max fiber at depth w+1 is <= 128988645 (closes full N_w without additive residual split; kappa-self-similar so not obviously easier).
Residual supports inject into D x F_p (size n*p) after first-match; slack ~5.94 bits with retained lift.

remaining.falsifier: Exhibit a primitive residual leaf at a finite prefix target z with support mass > t*p after the named first-match deletions, or a full prefix fiber larger than target_floor.
remaining.name: route_d_support_certificate
upstream_dead_ends_not_to_repeat: r=2 / CS / Plancherel alone (pw2 concentration floor)
absolute-value dual character sums (PR #398 barrier map)
raw Delsarte distance packing (Gilbert gap ~1.37e6 bits)

title: KB-MCA Route-D support certificate attack: proved lemmas + exact closure arithmetic

toy_suite.notes: Filtration is general. Fixed-core packing is general. Toy suite checks constant-shift normal form + packing + filtration numerics.
